text: $SIVE finally did the work after months of seeing it on my feed. The GlobalFoundries angle is real. Started a small long position.
$MRVL my biggest position going into earnings. Custom silicon story intact, I expect a guide-up.
$LITE at these levels is priced for perfection. Trimmed half, will buy back lower.
$SIVE adding on this dip. Photonics selloff is macro noise, the HVM ramp thesis hasn't changed.
$TSLA robotaxi utilization numbers leaked and they're better than expected. I think the market is asleep on this.
$MRVL post-earnings dump is a gift. Bought more this morning. $AAOI also on my list if it breaks below 135.
$META capex acceleration comments confirm the whole AI infra chain keeps running. Long the picks and shovels.
